channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter and overflowing bins oldhill, 28th March
item.description:
Oldhill coated in litter, all bins overflowing. Absolute mess.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oldhill Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped in shrub bed, 28th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped in shrub bed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Urswick Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Goldsmith Nature garden, 28th March
item.description:
Please can we have a this nature garden restored to back to a place where local residents can enjoy. It’s in a terrible state and not safe to walk through. Bins always over flowing and it needs new plants. If it was kept tidy and maintained it could be enjoyed by all.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goldsmith Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 28th March
item.description:
Continuous fly tipping outside numbers 14, 16 and 18. Unsanitary conditions. Scattered rubbish. I saw a rat. Blocked pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Guild House, Upper St Martin's Ln, London WC2H 9EG, 28th March
item.description:
During the morning patrol, the security officer observed that one of the signs in front of Equity had been struck and bent, likely by a large vehicle. This may have occurred due to the driver not paying attention to their surroundings. There is no CCTV footage available of the incident.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of Kylemore Road 29, 28th March
item.description:
The sign in ceramic has been broken for years, it’s a sorrow sight and it should be replaced or mended (my favourite option. It sits below a small patch of green which the neighbours care for by planting flowers each season. The street is much loved, so why not presenting it as it should, with its full name intact? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Hemstal Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish in alley at the end of Ridley Road, 28th March
item.description:
Rubbish appeared over night! They aren't the smartest of fly tippers as they have left their address on their amazon boxes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ridley Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Lime Scooter blocking pavement, 28th March
item.description:
Lime Scooter dumped and blocking pavement. Scooters are banned in Lewisham. Needs to be removed within 2 hours as per Lime agreement with London Borough of Lewisham.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oldfield Grove, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
